title: UiPath (NYSE:PATH) Stock Forecast & Analyst Predictions
text: Simply Wall St provides UiPath stock forecast and analyst predictions. Analyst outlook shows mixed signals on future performance. Revenue expectations: UiPath forecast to grow revenue at 8.3% CAGR over next 3 years, below historical growth rates but solid in current macro environment. Profitability analysis: While revenue grows, earnings are forecast to decline 23.6% per annum, suggesting margin compression despite top-line growth. This divergence between revenue and earnings growth creates challenge for valuation multiples. Valuation perspective: Stock trading below intrinsic value estimates based on revenue growth potential, but earnings decline forecasts limit upside. Key catalysts for change: 1) Successful AI monetization accelerating earnings recovery, 2) Sustained net new ARR growth at 11%+ rates, 3) Operating leverage in non-GAAP margins expanding toward 30% target. Risks include: 1) Macro slowdown impacting enterprise spending, 2) Competition from larger platforms integrating automation capabilities, 3) AI adoption pace slower than anticipated. Investment conclusion: Moderate growth story with reasonable valuation, suitable for growth-focused investors tolerating earnings volatility.
